parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) as total_pedidos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND status = 'entregue') as entregues,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND status = 'cancelado') as cancelados,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND status = 'entregue') as faturamento,
  (SELECT valor FROM cardapio_config WHERE chave = 'notif_admin_telefone') as admin_telefone,
  (SELECT valor FROM cardapio_config WHERE chave = 'notif_resumo_diario') as resumo_ativo
